task.title: Audit dependencies for vulnerabilities
task.description: Complete the following task: Audit dependencies for vulnerabilities. Follow best practices and ensure quality.
constraints: Do NOT modify anything under tests/.
Do NOT touch .env or any credential files.

steps.observation:
# coupon Configuration
# Generated by setup wizard

[database]
host = "localhost"
port = 5432
name = "coupon-project_db"

pool_size = 10

[cache]
enabled = true
ttl = 3600
backend = "redis"

[logging]
level = "INFO"
format = "json"
output = "stdout"

[features]
coupon_enabled = true
rate_limiting = true
metrics = true
